owner_operator_stated: Dr. Sam is presented as the practice's owner/founder on the staff page ('About Dr. Sam', prominent placement)
notes: Vendor hint 'Bridgeportfamilydental.com' is WRONG for this record: that domain belongs to a different, separately-owned co-located practice (Bridgeport Family Dental Center, Dr. Steve Vongluekiat/Dr. Intaek Choi, phone 312-791-0920/312-842-5338) at the same 2959 S Wallace St building. The correct site for BRIDGEPORT DENTAL SPECIALISTS LLC is childrensdentalworld.net (operating as DBA 'Children's Dental World'), corroborated by exact address AND exact phone (312-326-5437) match on the site's Chicago/Bridgeport office content. Pediatric dental practice, part of a 2-location group (Bridgeport + Morton Grove). No PE/DSO brand affiliation found.

Site corroborated by exact address (3425 S King Dr, Chicago, IL 60616) and exact phone (312-313-9777) match on the Contact and Meet the Team pages. The 'Meet The Team' page describes staff only generically ('a friendly team of professionals') with no individual dentist names/credentials in the fetched content, and no careers/hiring page exists anywhere on the site. Third-party directories (not the practice's own site) name a Dr. Vivian Vo, DMD at this address, but that could not be corroborated on-site, so no doctor entries are included per the on-site-source rule. No DSO/PE affiliation evidence found.

owner_operator_stated: Site footer credits 'Dr. Alexander G. Alemis and Family Dental Care™' as the practice/brand owner
notes: Site corroborated by exact address (3009 E 92nd St, Chicago, IL 60617) and exact phone (773-978-1231) match on the location's own page. Family Dental Care, PC is a multi-location group (7-8 offices across Chicago Southland/NW Indiana per site content, founded by Dr. Alexander G. Alemis in 1986) -- not a single-office independent practice, though no PE/DSO brand affiliation found. Careers page lists rolling job categories (dentist, hygienist, clinical assistant, front desk, insurance, accounts receivable, marketing) with an explicit application call-to-action rather than dated individual postings.

Vendor hint 'Surgicalsuites.com' is unrelated/wrong for this record (a surgical-suites rental business, not a dental practice site). Multiple directories (Yelp, Healthgrades, Sharecare, OpenNPI) confirm a practice named 'Stony Island Dental' at this exact address (1600 E 93rd St, Chicago, IL 60617), but they list phone (773) 530-7550 -- different from this record's phone (708) 351-4582 -- and none link to a practice-owned website; only third-party directory pages exist. A similarly-named site (dentistsouthsidechicago.com) surfaced in search but lists different addresses (8541 S Stony Island Ave and 2117 E 71st St) and phone numbers, so it is a different practice and was not used. No corroborated own-website found; roster/hiring could not be verified.
